category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates HQ wallpapers of planet Earth; source_facts.executables lists xplanet.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xplanet; official homepage title/source uses Xplanet.
docs_sources: Official Xplanet homepage exposes a dedicated documentation.php page with README, configuration, FAQ, and NEWS documentation.
repo_sources: Official Xplanet download page notes development code is in the SourceForge Subversion repository; SourceForge code browser is the official project source-control surface.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says planet Earth wallpapers; source_facts.executables lists a command-line executable; official docs describe command-line and configuration options.
